description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by several medium-sized deciduous trees, featuring a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior walls are a mix of light gray and natural wood paneling, with large glass windows and sliding doors that allow ample natural light into the interior. The front yard is landscaped with a variety of plants, including a prominent palm tree and flowering shrubs, and there is a paved pathway leading to the main entrance. The bungalow has a single story and a compact footprint, with a small covered porch area visible near the entrance. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban residential environment, with the trees providing privacy and shade.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wood and gray exterior, large glass windows, and landscaped front yard surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, landscaped yard, and several trees in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, side windows, and more trees clustered to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and a deck or patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch, grouped windows, and dense tree coverage on the right.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
